Dialog.name: MSG_OPE_STOP_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}What are you doing? C'mon, hurry up and choose a party.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OPE_STOP_JUNPEI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Dude, what're you doin'? Choose some party members already![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OPE_STOP_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}What exactly are you doing?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We don't have time to waste. Please decide who will be going with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OPE_STOP_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, where do you think you're going?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We have to get out of here as soon as we can, so hurry up and pick who's going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OPE_STOP_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's dangerous to fight with such a small group. You should bring more people with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_LETS_GO_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Okay, I'll get ready to provide support, then. Please head on over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_BOOK_SHELF_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Many encyclopedia[n]volumes are lined up here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are also star charts[n]and books on geology.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_BOOK_SHELF_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are many files labeled,[n]"Shadow Appearance Dates."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They are stamped with[n]"Do Not Remove" labels.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_BOOK_SHELF_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The titles contain many esoteric[n]terms that I can't understand...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They seem to have to do with[n]psychology and psychoanalysis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NOZOKI_ANYONE1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a bank of consoles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are others in the room right now,[n]so I shouldn't watch the videos...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NOZOKI_ANYONE2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a bank of consoles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A surveillance camera seems to have[n]turned itself on and recorded a video...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But there are others in the room right[n]now, so I shouldn't watch it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OPE_STOP_AEGIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please decide who will be joining you in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_OPE_STOP_AMADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is something wrong?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... Please decide who's going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1103_IKUTUKI_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}All right. Be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WAREHOUSE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The door is tightly sealed. I wonder[n]if it's a storage room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_CABINET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are all kinds of[n]decorations on the shelf.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}On either side are pictures of a[n]woman and a stern-looking man...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder who they are...[n]{f 1 1}
